places.name: Michelangelo's Hidden Drawings
places.description: The doodles of a genius line the walls of a secret room under the Medici Chapel, where they were hidden for nearly 500 years.

places.name: Santa Maria Novella Pharmacy
places.description: The oldest operating pharmacy in the world features 800-year-old recipes.

places.name: Buontalenti Grotta
places.description: A large grotto built in the 16th century amidst Florence's famous Boboli gardens.

places.name: Babae Wine Window
places.description: Drink wine handed out through a window as part of an age-old tradition.

places.name: La Specola Anatomical Collection
places.description: The largest and most famous wax anatomical collection anywhere in the world.

places.name: Medici Hall of Maps (Sala delle Carte Geografiche)
places.description: Over 50 exquisite hand-painted Renaissance maps decorate a Medici storage room.
